name: aurekai-mcp
description: Aurekai MCP server exposing 89 native runtime operators — doctor, manifests, artifact inspection, feature queries, semantic search, proof bundles, and the full Aurekai binary family.

tools.name: akai_doctor
tools.description: Run aurekai doctor --deep to verify the runtime installation

tools.name: akai_manifest
tools.description: Validate and inspect an Aurekai intake manifest

tools.name: akai_embed
tools.description: Run the Aurekai embed operator for vector embedding

tools.name: akai_fpq
tools.description: Feature-Proof Queue operator — enqueue and track proof bundles

tools.name: akai_tag
tools.description: Tag operator — apply semantic tags to artifacts
